suggestions.title: Implement dynamic ADR threshold scaling for volatile sessions
suggestions.detail: GBPUSD, EURUSD, AUDUSD hit 98-236% ADR exhaustion daily. Static 100% ADR gate is too rigid. Implement 120% threshold during high-vol sessions (London overlap, NFP) to capture extended-range FVGs without false vetoes.
suggestions.action: Edit ICT_ADR_THRESHOLD in ict_scanner config from 1.0 to 1.2; add session_type logic gating 1.0 during US solo hours.

suggestions.title: Remove AUDNZD from ALL_PAIRS, replace with EURJPY or GBPJPY
suggestions.detail: AUDNZD scoring 5.0 consistently below 7.0 threshold (ICTGrade.C). Cross-pair volatility drag. EURJPY/GBPJPY show stronger macro edges per v004 backtest data. Single swap reduces system complexity.
suggestions.action: Remove AUDNZD from ALL_PAIRS list in config.py; backtest EURJPY or GBPJPY replacement; update portfolio Sharpe target.

suggestions.title: Prioritize rate divergence hypothesis test completion
suggestions.detail: E1 (60-day hold rate divergence) in TESTING phase. Outcome affects v004 sizing logic and macro edge sustainability. Complete test within 7 days; if confirmed, implement as secondary edge filter.
suggestions.action: Run walk-forward backtest on E1 hypothesis using last 2y data; document pass/fail; if confirmed, add rate_divergence_filter to v004 entry logic.
